message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "objective": "Clarify and define the requirements for custom programming to avoid ambiguity.",
      "leverage": "Clear requirements will lead to more accurate development and reduce the risk of project delays.",
      "proposed_language": "The requirements for custom programming shall be clearly defined and documented prior to the commencement of each Phase, ensuring all parties have a mutual understanding.",
      "rationale": "This will minimize misunderstandings and ensure that the Developer delivers exactly what the Company needs, reducing the likelihood of costly revisions.",
      "priority": "high",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "objective": "Establish a more favorable payment structure tied to performance milestones.",
      "leverage": "Linking payments to specific deliverables ensures accountability and incentivizes timely delivery.",
      "proposed_language": "Payments shall be made upon the successful completion of each Phase, with a percentage withheld until the successful completion of a defined period of live use.",
      "rationale": "This structure protects the Company’s investment and ensures that the Developer is motivated to meet deadlines and quality standards.",
      "priority": "high",
      "confidence": 0.80
    },
    {
      "objective": "Ensure timely delivery with penalties for delays.",
      "leverage": "Penalties for late delivery will encourage the Developer to adhere to timelines.",
      "proposed_language": "For each day that delivery is late beyond the grace period, a penalty of [insert percentage] shall be applied to the total cost of the Phase.",
      "rationale": "This will create a financial incentive for the Developer to prioritize timely delivery and reduce the risk of project overruns.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "objective": "Define the acceptance testing process clearly.",
      "leverage": "A well-defined acceptance testing process will ensure that both parties understand the criteria for success.",
      "proposed_language": "The acceptance test shall be clearly defined in the Phase Agreement, including specific criteria for passing and the process for addressing failures.",
      "rationale": "This clarity will help avoid disputes over whether the software meets the agreed-upon specifications, facilitating smoother project completion.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.70
    },
    {
      "objective": "Include a cancellation clause for non-performance.",
      "leverage": "A cancellation clause protects the Company from being locked into a contract with a non-performing Developer.",
      "proposed_language": "In the event that the Developer fails to deliver the completed programs within [insert number] months after the original delivery date, the Company may cancel the Phase Agreement without further payment obligations.",
      "rationale": "This provides the Company with an exit strategy if the Developer fails to meet their obligations, ensuring that the Company is not left without recourse.",
      "priority": "high",
      "confidence": 0.85
    }
  ]
}
